reason: Visually transcendent odyssey through space with surreal, painterly compositions.
Noir‐tinged future L.A. rendered in haunting, rain‐soaked neon tableaux.
Psychedelic rock opera of isolation painted in bold, expressionistic imagery.
A dreamlike exploration of desire and fantasy in stunning black‐and‐white frames.
Lavish, stylized sets create a baroque visual feast of color and decadence.
One of the most visually original French fantasies with whimsical, surreal scenes.
Kinetic, neon‐soaked cyberpunk animation bursting with vivid detail.
A kaleidoscope of futuristic designs and vibrant, comic‐book color.
Enchanting stop‐motion world that’s more eerie than frightening.
Adult animated anthology fused with bold comic‐book visuals and rock score.
